case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. U.S. PARKING, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-10-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
